mnemonics.title: BST Property
mnemonics.content: Left Less, Right Right (Greater) - For any node, Left subtree values are Less, Right subtree values are Right (greater)

mnemonics.title: Deletion Cases
mnemonics.content: 0-1-2 Rule: 0 children (easy delete), 1 child (replace), 2 children (find successor)

mnemonics.title: Traversal Orders
mnemonics.content: INorder = IN sorted order, PREorder = PREfix notation, POSTorder = POSTfix notation
